technology

Roxana Aesthetics uses the advanced Alma Primex in Dubai

Roxana Aesthetics uses cutting-edge Alma PrimeX technology. As a destination for all things aesthetics, we strive to stay ahead of the curve and bring our clients the best possible treatments and results.
The Alma PrimeX is a comprehensive platform offering a range of non-invasive and minimally invasive treatments designed to reshape, tighten the body, eliminate fat deposits, reduce cellulite and firm skin. Fast and focused, this device utilizes advanced technology to deliver incredible results.

Book Consultation

Why Choose Us

Cutting edge-technologies

Step into the future of beauty at our clinic! With cutting-edge technologies at our fingertips, we are dedicated to providing you with innovative treatments and unparalleled care. Join us in our mission to revolutionize beauty and be among the first to experience it.

Our Team Members

Dr. Natallia Kaliashuk

Specialist Dermatology

Achieve the results you desire with the expertise of Dr. Natallia Kaliashuk, who specializes in advanced skin rejuvenation, facial aesthetics, and body contouring to enhance your natural beauty with expert precision.

Dr. Svetlana Kubata

General Practitioner

Discover the unparalleled expertise of Dr. Svetlana Kubata at Roxana Aesthetics, where your natural beauty is artfully enhanced with precision and care.

Mirna Dehaybi

Aesthetician / Beauty Therapist

Mirna Dehaybi is a senior paramedical aesthetician with over 18 years of experience. She specialises in advanced skin treatments and laser technologies, offering results-driven, personalised care backed by extensive clinical expertise and internationally recognised qualifications.

Jurgita Prosceviciene

Aesthetician / Beauty Therapist

Discover the artistry and professionalism of Jurgita Prosceviciene and let her guide you on your journey to confidence and beauty.

Siyamak Afroozi

Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT)

Delivering expert physiotherapy in Dubai, Siyamak Afroozi specializes in sports injury rehabilitation, pain management, and advanced recovery treatments.

Roxana Diaconu

Words from our Founder

”For years, I have been visiting top clinics in Dubai. Exploring all the variety of services they provide I had a very different experience, going through ups and downs. This helped me gain a full clarity on what I want, what I truly need and what I would never want to endure again as a client.
Taking from that, I realized what the market lacks most and what we as a clinic can offer to stand out. Of course, we all expect an efficient treatment by qualified staff. But when it comes to beauty procedures, this is not enough. I know how crucial the entire atmosphere of this kind of journey is, as I walked in those shoes of the client not just one mile.
At Roxana Aesthetic Clinic we want you to go through all the spectrum of care, so you would enjoy each little detail of experience and enjoy it fully.
I am proud to announce that finally there’s a clinic where clients can let go and relax, at the same time getting the world-class treatment they came for. And I believe, it wasn’t just my dream that has come true. Dubai’s been waiting for us — and here we are. ‘’

Book Consultation

FAQ's

Discover Everything You Need to Know

What aesthetic treatments are offered at Roxana Aesthetics Clinic?

We offer a wide range of advanced aesthetic services, including facial treatments, laser hair removal, PRP skin rejuvenation, chemical peels, injectables (fillers), and hydrafacials — all personalized to your skin goals.

Are your doctors and specialists licensed?

Yes. All treatments at Roxana Aesthetics Clinic are performed by qualified, DHA-licensed medical professionals with extensive experience in aesthetic medicine. Your safety and comfort are always our top priority.

Do you offer personalized treatment plans?

Absolutely. We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. During your consultation, our specialists take the time to understand your concerns and design a treatment plan tailored specifically to you.

How can I book an appointment?

Booking is simple. You can call the clinic directly, send us a WhatsApp message, or submit a request through our website. Our team will assist you in scheduling a convenient time.

Do you offer installment plans or exclusive discounts?

Yes. Roxana Aesthetics Clinic offers flexible installment options through Tabby and Tamara , allowing you to split your payments comfortably.

We also provide exclusive discounts for members of Emirates Platinum, Fazaa, and Esaad . Our team will be happy to guide you through the available benefits and help you choose the best payment option for your treatment.

View All FAQS

Satisfied Clients

Testimonials from Our Beloved Clients

Tules Yaraman

Nada Aljeaidi

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“To be honest, as a first time experiencing laser with my type of sensitive skin I can honestly tell you that this place is amazing with everything. With the care and attention to the safety and sanitation of the clinic, no mistake. I have been getting laser treatment with Gin now for up to a year, she has taken care of me and my skin so beautifully. Definitely recommend.”

Ash Haimen

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Having laser here with the amazing Diana and she is very sweet so professional! 🥰 I recommend it for sensitive skin as well, they are using Alma Soprano machine which is very effective and faster than other machines ✨ #Laser #Skin #Technology #Beauty”

Nader Ali

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had an amazing experience at Roxana Aesthetic Clinic. The ambiance is good, very clean and relaxing very comfortable. The reception team was warm and welcoming. Did my laser to Ghin she is very professional and very good she taking care of me.”

Karim Bou Gebrayel

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had a great experience at Roxana Aesthetic Clinic. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was welcoming and professional.

Special thanks to DANY at the reception — she was extremely polite, professional, and well organized. She explained everything clearly, handled the appointments smoothly, and made me feel comfortable from start to finish. Her positive attitude and professionalism truly made a difference.

The clinic is clean, modern, and very well managed. I highly recommend Roxana Aesthetic Clinic for anyone looking for excellent service and outstanding customer care.”

Lana Dunn

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I really love how warm and welcoming this clinic is. Dr Natalia has a real talent when it comes to small enhancements to your features. I am not one for a lot of filler and asthetics but wow she really knows how to make you feel comfortable and trust she knows exactly what to do. I also cannot recommend Liz enough for all things skin and semi permanent make up she is a true artist and has many years experience.”

Neha Sahgal

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Found this gem on Al Wasl road just while i was exploring and trying to find one trustworthy place out of millions of clinics dubai has to offer. This one will not dissapoint. Professional and friendly staff and technicians, clean and beautifully designed place with top of the line machines n treatments. Special shoutout to the laser tech Gin!”

Aisha Alshamsi

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Best clinic with the best prices I have been coming since a year now and I won’t go to other clinics gin is the best for doing laser”

Nesrin Bou frem

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Had my facial with Mira and she is absolutely fantastic! My skin is glowing 10/10✨ Lovely clinic with very professional staff”

AJ

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had a hair removal session at Roxana Clinic and I am happy with the service. The lady who treated me, Gin, was professional and focused on her work. She worked carefully and made sure I was comfortable during the session. Her hands were soft and gentle and she paid attention to detail. The whole experience felt clean and well managed.”

About Us

The big story behind, our beautyness center

Our Story

Step into a world of relaxation and rejuvenation at Roxana Aesthetics Clinic. Here, every detail has been carefully considered to create a haven of peace and comfort for our clients. From the warm smile of our welcoming staff to the calming atmosphere, we’ve created an environment that is truly special.
At Roxana, we believe that beauty is more than just skin deep. It’s about feeling confident, refreshed, and rejuvenated from the inside out. Our highly qualified and skilled team is dedicated to providing efficient and effective treatments that are tailored to each individual’s needs.
We believe that beauty is a journey, not a destination. At Roxana, we’re thrilled to be a part of that journey. Whether you’re looking for a moment of escape or a complete transformation, we’re here to help you feel your best. We believe that everyone deserves a beauty experience that is elevated, personalized, and truly unforgettable.

Roxana Diaconu

Words from our Founder

”For years, I have been visiting top clinics in Dubai. Exploring all the variety of services they provide I had a very different experience, going through ups and downs. This helped me gain a full clarity on what I want, what I truly need and what I would never want to endure again as a client.
Taking from that, I realized what the market lacks most and what we as a clinic can offer to stand out. Of course, we all expect an efficient treatment by qualified staff. But when it comes to beauty procedures, this is not enough. I know how crucial the entire atmosphere of this kind of journey is, as I walked in those shoes of the client not just one mile.
At Roxana Aesthetic Clinic we want you to go through all the spectrum of care, so you would enjoy each little detail of experience and enjoy it fully.
I am proud to announce that finally there’s a clinic where clients can let go and relax, at the same time getting the world-class treatment they came for. And I believe, it wasn’t just my dream that has come true. Dubai’s been waiting for us — and here we are. ‘’

Book Consultation

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I really love how warm and welcoming this clinic is. Dr Natalia has a real talent when it comes to small enhancements to your features. I am not one for a lot of filler and asthetics but wow she really knows how to make you feel comfortable and trust she knows exactly what to do. I also cannot recommend Liz enough for all things skin and semi permanent make up she is a true artist and has many years experience.”

Neha Sahgal

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Found this gem on Al Wasl road just while i was exploring and trying to find one trustworthy place out of millions of clinics dubai has to offer. This one will not dissapoint. Professional and friendly staff and technicians, clean and beautifully designed place with top of the line machines n treatments. Special shoutout to the laser tech Gin!”

Aisha Alshamsi

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Best clinic with the best prices I have been coming since a year now and I won’t go to other clinics gin is the best for doing laser”

Nesrin Bou frem

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Had my facial with Mira and she is absolutely fantastic! My skin is glowing 10/10✨ Lovely clinic with very professional staff”

AJ

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had a hair removal session at Roxana Clinic and I am happy with the service. The lady who treated me, Gin, was professional and focused on her work. She worked carefully and made sure I was comfortable during the session. Her hands were soft and gentle and she paid attention to detail. The whole experience felt clean and well managed.”

@roxanaaesthetics

Emsculpt Neo Body contouring and muscle toning technology

Skin Treatments
View All →

PRP Therapy Skin rejuvenation using platelet-rich plasma
Chemical Peels Exfoliation for smoother, clearer skin
Microneedling Collagen-supporting skin renewal treatment
Tattoo Removal Laser-based tattoo removal treatments
IPL Photo Rejuvenation Light-based therapy for even skin tone
PH Formula Treatment Medical-grade skin resurfacing
Morpheus8 Pro RF microneedling for deep skin tightening
Thermage FLX Non-invasive radiofrequency skin tightening
Frax Pro Fractional laser skin resurfacing

Facial Treatments
View All →

Deep Cleansing Facial Thorough pore cleansing and skin purification
HydraFacial Multi-step hydration and extraction facial
Korean Facial K-beauty inspired multi-layer skin ritual
Hyperpigmentation Treatment Treatment for dark spots and uneven skin tone
Facial for Men Tailored facial treatments for men's skin
Acne Facial Facial treatment for acne-prone skin
Brightening Facial Illuminate dull skin for a radiant glow
Rejuvenation Facial Advanced facial rejuvenation treatment

Injectables
View All →

Dermal Fillers Volume and wrinkle treatment with fillers
Lip Filler (Russian Technique) Enhanced lip shape and volume
Skin Boosters Hydration-focused skin booster injections
Salmon DNA / PDRN Regenerative therapy for skin repair
Rejuran Treatment Polynucleotide therapy for skin healing
Profhilo Injections Bio-remodeling for intense hydration
Profhilo Structura Treatment skin laxity
Sculptra Collagen stimulation treatment
Mesotherapy Skin revitalization injections
AnteAGE MDX Treatment Advanced regenerative therapy
ASCE Exosomes Treatment Exosome skin rejuvenation

RRS HA Lifting Hyaluronic acid-based skin lifting
Jawline Contouring Jawline contouring treatment with fillers
Collagen Stimulating Injections Collagen support injection therapy
PB Serum for Face Enzymatic biorevitalization treatment
Nithya Collagen Stimulator Collagen stimulation treatment
Under Eye Fillers Under eye area treatment with fillers
Cheek Fillers Cheek volume and contouring treatment
Butt Filler Augmentation Non-surgical buttock contouring procedure
Filler Dissolving Filler dissolution treatment
Fat Dissolving Injections Injectable body contouring treatment
Double Chin Removal Non-surgical chin contouring procedure
Wrinkle Treatment Treatment for fine lines and wrinkles

Our Team

Meet Our Expert Team of Beauty Professionals

The Amazing Team at Roxana Aesthetics Clinic

At Roxana Aesthetics Clinic Dubai, our experienced aesthetic doctors and beauty specialists are dedicated to delivering safe, personalized treatments. Each expert brings advanced clinical training and a passion for natural, refined results.
Explore our team profiles to find the right specialist for your aesthetic journey.

JOIN OUR TEAM

All Team Members

Dr. Natallia Kaliashuk

Specialist Dermatology

Achieve the results you desire with the expertise of Dr. Natallia Kaliashuk, who specializes in advanced skin rejuvenation, facial aesthetics, and body contouring to enhance your natural beauty with expert precision.

Dr. Svetlana Kubata

General Practitioner

Discover the unparalleled expertise of Dr. Svetlana Kubata at Roxana Aesthetics, where your natural beauty is artfully enhanced with precision and care.

Mirna Dehaybi

Aesthetician / Beauty Therapist

Mirna Dehaybi is a senior paramedical aesthetician with over 18 years of experience. She specialises in advanced skin treatments and laser technologies, offering results-driven, personalised care backed by extensive clinical expertise and internationally recognised qualifications.

Jurgita Prosceviciene

Aesthetician / Beauty Therapist

Discover the artistry and professionalism of Jurgita Prosceviciene and let her guide you on your journey to confidence and beauty.

Siyamak Afroozi

Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT)

Delivering expert physiotherapy in Dubai, Siyamak Afroozi specializes in sports injury rehabilitation, pain management, and advanced recovery treatments.

Roxana Diaconu

Words from our Founder

”For years, I have been visiting top clinics in Dubai. Exploring all the variety of services they provide I had a very different experience, going through ups and downs. This helped me gain a full clarity on what I want, what I truly need and what I would never want to endure again as a client.
Taking from that, I realized what the market lacks most and what we as a clinic can offer to stand out. Of course, we all expect an efficient treatment by qualified staff. But when it comes to beauty procedures, this is not enough. I know how crucial the entire atmosphere of this kind of journey is, as I walked in those shoes of the client not just one mile.
At Roxana Aesthetic Clinic we want you to go through all the spectrum of care, so you would enjoy each little detail of experience and enjoy it fully.
I am proud to announce that finally there’s a clinic where clients can let go and relax, at the same time getting the world-class treatment they came for. And I believe, it wasn’t just my dream that has come true. Dubai’s been waiting for us — and here we are. ‘’

Book Consultation

The Founder’s Perspective - forbes articles

Satisfied Clients

Testimonials from Our Beloved Clients

Tules Yaraman

Nada Aljeaidi

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“To be honest, as a first time experiencing laser with my type of sensitive skin I can honestly tell you that this place is amazing with everything. With the care and attention to the safety and sanitation of the clinic, no mistake. I have been getting laser treatment with Gin now for up to a year, she has taken care of me and my skin so beautifully. Definitely recommend.”

Ash Haimen

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Having laser here with the amazing Diana and she is very sweet so professional! 🥰 I recommend it for sensitive skin as well, they are using Alma Soprano machine which is very effective and faster than other machines ✨ #Laser #Skin #Technology #Beauty”

Nader Ali

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had an amazing experience at Roxana Aesthetic Clinic. The ambiance is good, very clean and relaxing very comfortable. The reception team was warm and welcoming. Did my laser to Ghin she is very professional and very good she taking care of me.”

Karim Bou Gebrayel

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had a great experience at Roxana Aesthetic Clinic. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was welcoming and professional.

Special thanks to DANY at the reception — she was extremely polite, professional, and well organized. She explained everything clearly, handled the appointments smoothly, and made me feel comfortable from start to finish. Her positive attitude and professionalism truly made a difference.

The clinic is clean, modern, and very well managed. I highly recommend Roxana Aesthetic Clinic for anyone looking for excellent service and outstanding customer care.”

Lana Dunn

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I really love how warm and welcoming this clinic is. Dr Natalia has a real talent when it comes to small enhancements to your features. I am not one for a lot of filler and asthetics but wow she really knows how to make you feel comfortable and trust she knows exactly what to do. I also cannot recommend Liz enough for all things skin and semi permanent make up she is a true artist and has many years experience.”

Neha Sahgal

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Found this gem on Al Wasl road just while i was exploring and trying to find one trustworthy place out of millions of clinics dubai has to offer. This one will not dissapoint. Professional and friendly staff and technicians, clean and beautifully designed place with top of the line machines n treatments. Special shoutout to the laser tech Gin!”

Aisha Alshamsi

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Best clinic with the best prices I have been coming since a year now and I won’t go to other clinics gin is the best for doing laser”

Nesrin Bou frem

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Had my facial with Mira and she is absolutely fantastic! My skin is glowing 10/10✨ Lovely clinic with very professional staff”

AJ

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I had a hair removal session at Roxana Clinic and I am happy with the service. The lady who treated me, Gin, was professional and focused on her work. She worked carefully and made sure I was comfortable during the session. Her hands were soft and gentle and she paid attention to detail. The whole experience felt clean and well managed.”

@roxanaaesthetics
